features.featureTitle: Find and replace every occurrence of 'EduManage' (including variations like 'EduManage.', 'EDUMANAGE') with 'Nirgrantha' in all post-login frontend components, including but not limited to: the footer component (which currently shows '© 2026 EduManage. All rights reserved.'), the SmartCampus Connect logo area, dashboard shells (StudentDashboard.tsx, FacultyIntelligenceHub.tsx, InstituteCommandCenter.tsx, ParentInsightPortal.tsx), and any sub-components under frontend/src/components/tabs/. No instance of 'EduManage' should appear anywhere in the rendered UI after login.
